name: Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Pour batter into a lightly greased muffin pan.
3. Bake at 425°F for 20-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
4. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack.
5. Transfer to a tightly sealed container and store in the refrigerator.
